race.comment: Was wide open but really looks a race in three after a host pf scratchings. DUBAI AFFAIR (5) ran a much better race second-up to score an impressive maiden win this course and distance. Fitter again and although drawn wide will go forward and take catching again. DINA TYCOON (3) was also off the mark with a maiden win second-up, scoring by two lengths. Drawn for a soft run and can make it back-to-back wins. RESPITE (1) is yet to run a bad race in four career starts including a maiden win last time in. Can measure up again fresh. FRUIT OF DE VINE (12) is fitter for two runs for the new yard and can show best form.
